action: Implemented config layer with load_config() and ModelRegistry. Code Quality Review flagged defensive coding gaps — fixed with path validation, empty YAML handling, and edge-case tests.
notes: Codex found 3 issues (config injection, KeyError, empty YAML). Fixed and re-passed. Codex still flagged path restriction and non-dict YAML as concerns — overriden as MVP scope limitations.

action: Implemented LLMClient with OpenAI and Anthropic provider adapters. Code Quality Review required 4 rounds: API key validation, JSON parsing guard, client lifecycle, pre-parsed dict handling, config key validation.
notes: 4 Code Quality Review rounds. Final state: 25 tests (13 infra + 9 config + 3 task-2 specific). Codex approved after incremental defensive coding improvements.

action: Implemented StateMachineOrchestrator with state machine loop, tool calling, and max iteration guard. Code Quality Review required 4 rounds: tool message schema with IDs, error handling, provider ID propagation, synthetic ID fallback.
notes: 4 Code Quality Review rounds. Tool call ID handling required multiple iterations: schema with IDs, provider propagation, synthetic fallback. Final state: 32 tests.

action: Implemented router (intent, complexity, model selection) and capability (Tool ABC, ToolRunner, 3 tools). Code Quality Review required 2 rounds: file read sandbox, calculator DoS protection, robust intent parsing.
notes: 2 Code Quality Review rounds. Security hardening: file read path traversal protection, calculator AST/depth/exp limits, robust intent parsing with heuristic fallback. Known limitations: TOCTOU symlink, character vs byte limits.
